purpose: A curated, validated catalogue of manageable datasets for data exploration projects. Built for both human browsing and AI-agent handoff.

deduped_or_corrected: HM Land Registry Price Paid Data appeared twice and was merged.
STATS19 road safety appeared twice and was merged.
Eurostat regional statistics appeared twice and was merged.
English Indices of Deprivation generic and 2025 links were merged.
Tate Collection Metadata appeared twice and was merged.
Food Hygiene Ratings appeared twice and was merged.
Old The Pudding GitHub owner links were corrected from thepudding to the-pudding.
IPSA moved from the suggested annual-publications URL to the current MP staffing/business costs publication page.
Eurovision was switched from a stale GitHub link to a currently reachable Eurovision dataset source.

strict_open_download_pass.criteria: Keep only datasets with an openly downloadable CSV/XLS/XLSX/ODS/JSON/GeoJSON file, a ZIP of standard files, or an unauthenticated endpoint. Drop login, API key, account-gated, search-only, and specialist-primary-format datasets.

removed_datasets.title: Armed Conflict Location & Event Data
removed_datasets.reason: Requires myACLED account/API token/export workflow.

removed_datasets.title: American Time Use Survey
removed_datasets.reason: BLS ZIP endpoint returned 403 from agent fetch path during strict validation, so it is not reliable for open agent download.

removed_datasets.title: BoardGameGeek Database
removed_datasets.reason: Kaggle/account source; no qualifying unauthenticated direct file found for this rich dataset.

removed_datasets.title: BBC Desert Island Discs Castaways
removed_datasets.reason: Concrete XLSX endpoint returned 403/202 in unauthenticated probes.

removed_datasets.title: Energy Performance Certificate Data - England & Wales
removed_datasets.reason: Requires GOV.UK One Login or API sign-up/key for bulk access.

removed_datasets.title: Fingertips Public Health Profiles
removed_datasets.reason: Public health CSV endpoint timed out repeatedly from the agent fetch path during strict validation.

removed_datasets.title: Global Terrorism Database
removed_datasets.reason: Official access requires terms/form/EULA route.

removed_datasets.title: Met Office HadUK-Grid Climate Observations
removed_datasets.reason: Primary download is NetCDF, outside the simple-format bar.

removed_datasets.title: UK Met Office Historic Station Data
removed_datasets.reason: Primary station files are plain text tables, not CSV/XLS/XLSX/ODS/JSON/GeoJSON.

removed_datasets.title: NBN Atlas Species Occurrence Data
removed_datasets.reason: Occurrence downloads require login and licence acceptance.

removed_datasets.title: OpenAQ Air Quality Data
removed_datasets.reason: Current API requires an API key.

removed_datasets.title: OpenPrescribing
removed_datasets.reason: Could not validate a stable unauthenticated CSV/JSON endpoint; Cloudflare challenge blocked access.

removed_datasets.title: Natural England Priority Habitats Inventory
removed_datasets.reason: GeoJSON ZIP is roughly 1.3GB, above the catalogue size rule and too easy to trigger as an accidental large download.

removed_datasets.title: Global Space Launches
removed_datasets.reason: Direct file is TSV/fixed text, outside the allowed format bar.

removed_datasets.title: TidyTuesday Repository
removed_datasets.reason: Meta-repository requiring manual dataset selection, not one dataset file/endpoint.

removed_datasets.title: UCL Legacies of British Slavery Database
removed_datasets.reason: Searchable HTML database, no supported direct CSV/XLS/JSON bulk/API route found.

rejected_groups.title: BLS Local Area Unemployment Statistics Time Series
rejected_groups.reason: Direct download path was blocked in Chrome and returned 403 via curl, despite one Node fetch path succeeding.

merged_or_deduplicated: EPA Annual AQI repeated across batches and was merged into one entry with 2024 and 2025 links.
USGS Earthquake all-month and 2.5+ feeds were merged into one entry.
USGS instantaneous and daily water services were merged into one entry.
Natural Earth 10m and 110m country boundaries were merged into one entry.
CDC PLACES county/place suggestions were merged into one entry.
CDC Chronic Disease Indicators repeated across batches and was merged.
NASA Exoplanet Archive suggestions were merged into one filtered TAP entry.
SSA national and state baby-name files were merged into one entry.
additional_search_passes.validation: Direct links were probed with HEAD/GET without full large downloads; representative source pages and the final catalogue were checked in Chrome.

removed_datasets.title: CDC Nutrition, Physical Activity and Obesity Indicators
removed_datasets.reason: Dropped in curation trim to 100: overlaps heavily with CDC PLACES and CDC Chronic Disease Indicators.

removed_datasets.title: FRED U.S. Unemployment Rate
removed_datasets.reason: Dropped in curation trim to 100: too small and thin as a standalone student exercise.

removed_datasets.title: Natural Earth Admin 0 Countries
removed_datasets.reason: Dropped in curation trim to 100: useful map reference layer, but too small and not story-rich by itself.

removed_datasets.title: U.S. Census TIGER/Line County Boundaries
removed_datasets.reason: Dropped in curation trim to 100: useful boundary plumbing, but not a strong standalone exploration dataset.

category_review.rationale: Rebalanced overloaded transport, environment and culture buckets into shorter, clearer categories for student browsing.

categories.title: People & Places
categories.description: Demographic, boundary and migration datasets for comparing populations and places.

categories.title: Transit & Travel
categories.description: Movement, transport-service and travel datasets with routes, trips, stations or vehicles.

categories.title: Public Safety
categories.description: Crime, crashes, emergency, disaster and conflict datasets about public risk and response.

categories.title: Homes & Cities
categories.description: Housing, planning, urban services and built-environment datasets.

categories.title: Weather & Hazards
categories.description: Weather, water, air-quality and natural-hazard datasets with strong time or map stories.

categories.title: Nature & Science
categories.description: Biodiversity, forestry, meteorite and astronomy datasets for scientific exploration.

categories.title: Work & Trade
categories.description: Jobs, productivity, wages, trade, agriculture and local industry datasets.

categories.title: Money & Organisations
categories.description: Companies, charities, finance, spending and institutional datasets.

categories.title: Health & Food
categories.description: Health, nutrition, food safety and food-access datasets.

categories.title: Arts & Archives
categories.description: Museum, archive, historical and heritage datasets.

categories.title: Culture & Leisure
categories.description: Music, media, games, restaurants, hobbies and playful cultural datasets.

datasets.title: Census 2021 Bulk Data via Nomis
datasets.description: England and Wales small-area demographic tables from Census 2021.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with TS001 usual resident population ZIP (ZIP of CSV).
datasets.size: Topic ZIPs vary but are generally manageable; the full catalogue is broad.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current via Nomis bulk download and API routes.
datasets.caveats: Census disclosure control applies; original and added geographies are separated.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: Census 2021 Origin-Destination Flows
datasets.description: Movement tables for work, migration and second addresses in England and Wales.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with OD workplace flow package ZIP (ZIP of CSV).
datasets.size: Small tables are KB-MB; the workplace package is roughly hundreds of MB.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current through Nomis OD pages.
datasets.caveats: Census Day 2021 occurred during COVID restrictions; detailed OD may require safeguarded access.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: English Indices of Deprivation 2025
datasets.description: Official relative deprivation rankings for small areas in England across multiple domains.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with All ranks scores deciles CSV (CSV).
datasets.size: Small to moderate; LSOA tables cover 33,755 areas.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current 2025 release.
datasets.caveats: Ranks are relative, not absolute; not directly comparable with Scotland, Wales or Northern Ireland indices.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: Eurostat Regional Statistics by NUTS Region
datasets.description: EU regional data on population, labour, economy, health, environment and more.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with Eurostat JSON-stat API example (JSON-stat API).
datasets.size: Manageable when filtered; broad regional tables can get large.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current official EU data and API docs.
datasets.caveats: NUTS versions change; keep the boundary year explicit.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: GeoNames Cities500 Gazetteer
datasets.description: Global populated-place gazetteer with coordinates, feature codes, population and country/admin identifiers for places above 500 residents.
datasets.access: Use the protected ZIP and parse the tab-delimited UTF-8 text using the GeoNames README field order.
datasets.size: About 13MB zipped.
datasets.validation: Direct ZIP returned application/zip with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Population and administrative fields can lag official sources; alternative names need careful handling.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: IRS County-to-County Migration Data
datasets.description: U.S. tax-filer migration flows between counties and states, useful for origin-destination movement stories.
datasets.access: Use a single county inflow/outflow CSV for a focused story or the full ZIP for all migration tables.
datasets.size: Full ZIP about 14MB; individual CSVs are smaller.
datasets.validation: Direct IRS CSV and ZIP links returned data with expected content types.
datasets.caveats: Tax-filer based; young, low-income and non-filing populations are underrepresented.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: Nomis Annual Population Survey / Labour Market Data
datasets.description: Quarterly survey-based local labour-market estimates for employment, unemployment, qualifications, industry and occupation.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with APS Nomis CSV API example (CSV API).
datasets.size: Manageable when filtered by topic and area.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current; updated quarterly.
datasets.caveats: Survey estimates are not counts; small groups can be suppressed or unreliable.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: OECD Regional Well-Being
datasets.description: Regional scores across income, jobs, housing, health, access, environment, education, safety, civic engagement, community and life satisfaction.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with OECD Regional Well-Being XLSX (XLSX).
datasets.size: Small: hundreds of regions across 11 topics.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current OECD page.
datasets.caveats: Constructed scores; visible site content update may lag.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: ONS Open Geography Portal Boundaries
datasets.description: Official UK statistical geography boundary files for joining area-code datasets to maps.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with LSOA 2021 boundaries GeoJSON (GeoJSON).
datasets.size: Usually manageable by geography; national small-area layers need spatial tooling.
datasets.license: Open Government Licence where stated on each item.
datasets.validation: Reachable live source. Best treated as a companion dataset for UK area-code joins.
datasets.caveats: Match boundary year and area-code version to the statistical table being mapped.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: UNHCR Refugee Population Statistics API
datasets.description: UNHCR population statistics for refugees, asylum seekers, internally displaced people and related displacement categories.
datasets.access: Use the protected CSV ZIP example for 2020-2024, or remove download=true for JSON pagination.
datasets.size: The 2020-2024 all-country CSV ZIP probe was about 257KB.
datasets.license: UNHCR data terms; cite UNHCR Refugee Population Statistics Database.
datasets.validation: Direct no-key API query returned an application/zip CSV download.
datasets.caveats: Definitions and country coding matter; do not mix displacement categories casually.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: World Bank World Development Indicators
datasets.description: Global country-level indicators across economy, health, education, energy, environment, infrastructure and poverty.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with WDI CSV ZIP (ZIP of CSV).
datasets.size: Bulk WDI is broad but manageable; API subsets are easy.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current.
datasets.caveats: Country/year coverage and source definitions vary; revisions are common.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: Bus Open Data Service - England
datasets.description: England local bus timetables, fares and live vehicle-location feeds.

links.label: Find and use bus open data

datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with All timetables GTFS ZIP (ZIP of GTFS text/CSV).
datasets.size: Large nationally; manageable by operator, region or feed.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current.
datasets.caveats: Live data is operational and can be stale/noisy; not a tidy single-table dataset.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: Citi Bike January 2024 Trip Data
datasets.description: Monthly NYC-region bike-share trips with ride IDs, timestamps, stations, coordinates and member/casual flags.
datasets.access: Use the protected January 2024 ZIP for a bounded analysis; avoid pulling the whole historical bucket.
datasets.size: About 369MB for this month.
datasets.validation: Direct public S3 ZIP returned application/zip with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Monthly files are large; privacy-preserving fields and schema can change over time.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: DfT Road Traffic Counts
datasets.description: GB traffic counts and annual average daily flows for count points and road links.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with AADF counts ZIP (ZIP of CSV).
datasets.size: Manageable; raw counts are millions of rows but still ordinary data-tool scale.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current.
datasets.caveats: Use estimation method flags; counted data is stronger than estimated traffic.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: Divvy Chicago Trip Data - 2018 Q3
datasets.description: Chicago bike-share trip data for a manageable historical quarter, suitable for station-flow and seasonality analysis.
datasets.access: Use the protected 2018 Q3 ZIP and note older Divvy schemas differ from current Lyft/Cyclistic schemas.
datasets.size: About 39MB.
datasets.validation: Direct public S3 ZIP returned application/zip with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Older schemas differ from newer files; demographic fields should be handled carefully.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: London Public Transport Journeys by Mode
datasets.description: TfL reporting-period journey counts by bus, Underground, DLR, tram, Overground and other modes.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with TfL journeys by mode XLSX (XLSX).
datasets.size: Small and classroom-friendly.
datasets.validation: Reachable; sub-agent saw a recent update.
datasets.caveats: TfL reporting periods differ in length; mode definitions and coverage change over time.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: MBTA Static GTFS Schedule Feed
datasets.description: Boston-area static transit schedules in standard GTFS tables inside one ZIP.
story_ideas: Service frequency by time of day
datasets.access: Use the protected GTFS ZIP and parse the CSV-like .txt files.
datasets.size: About 18MB.
datasets.validation: Direct CDN GTFS ZIP returned application/zip with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Static schedule feed changes as planned service changes; not real-time operations.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: MTA NYC Subway Static GTFS Feed
datasets.description: Static GTFS schedule feed for New York City subway routes, stops, trips and service calendars.
datasets.access: Use the protected GTFS ZIP; parse the standard CSV-like .txt files inside.
datasets.size: About 5.6MB.
datasets.validation: Direct S3 GTFS ZIP returned application/zip with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Static schedules are not live service status; schema follows GTFS conventions.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: NaPTAN Public Transport Access Nodes
datasets.description: GB public transport stops and stations, including bus, rail, tram, ferry, airport and coach nodes.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with NaPTAN national CSV API (CSV API).
datasets.size: Manageable national reference dataset.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current.
datasets.caveats: Reference stops only, not schedules; excludes Northern Ireland.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: NYC Taxi and For-Hire Vehicle Trip Records
datasets.description: Monthly NYC taxi and for-hire vehicle trip files with pickup/drop-off times, zones, fares and trip attributes.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with Green Taxi CSV API sample (CSV API).
datasets.size: Very large full history; manageable by month/type.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current.
datasets.caveats: Schema changes across years; full-history use needs database tooling.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: ORR Estimates of Station Usage
datasets.description: Annual entries, exits and interchanges for railway stations in Great Britain.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with Table 1410 CSV (CSV).
datasets.size: Small and very manageable.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current; latest release April 2024 to March 2025.
datasets.caveats: Estimates are ticket-sales based, not observed footfall.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: OurAirports Global Airports and Runways
datasets.description: Lightweight global CSVs for airports, runways, countries and regions, updated frequently and easy to map.
datasets.access: Use the protected CSV files directly; join airports to runways by airport identifiers.
datasets.size: Small: airports about 3.9MB, runways about 1.3MB.
datasets.validation: Chrome source page showed CSV downloads; direct CSV links returned text/csv.
datasets.caveats: Community-maintained metadata may lag official aviation sources.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: TfL Cycle Hire Usage
datasets.description: Historical journey data for London's cycle-hire scheme.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with Example journey CSV (CSV).
datasets.size: Manageable by file or month; all history is larger.
datasets.validation: Reachable public bucket.
datasets.caveats: Bucket listing can be JS-like; journey data is historical, live API covers station status.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: US BTS Airline On-Time Statistics
datasets.description: US domestic flight on-time, delay, cancellation, carrier, route and airport data.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with February 2026 on-time ZIP (ZIP of CSV).
datasets.size: Monthly files are manageable; full history is many GB.
datasets.license: US public domain/federal open data where stated.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current; latest available data seen as February 2026.
datasets.caveats: UI can be JS-heavy; carrier code reuse and schema timing matter.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: Washington State Electric Vehicle Population Data
datasets.description: Washington vehicle-registration records for battery-electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles, with geography and vehicle attributes.
datasets.access: Use the protected Socrata CSV query; add county, city or model filters for smaller slices.
datasets.size: Manageable state-level Socrata table.
datasets.validation: Direct Socrata CSV query returned text/csv.
datasets.caveats: Registration location is not necessarily where a vehicle is driven or charged.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: Chicago Crimes - Filtered Monthly Extract
datasets.description: Police-reported Chicago incident records with type, date, location fields and community context for a bounded month.
datasets.access: Use the protected January 2025 query; adjust date filters for other months.
datasets.size: Manageable one-month extract with 50k row limit.
datasets.validation: Direct Socrata CSV query returned text/csv.
datasets.caveats: Incident data is not a measure of all crime; reporting, classification and privacy masking matter.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: FEMA Disaster Declarations Summaries
datasets.description: OpenFEMA disaster declarations since 1953 with incident type, geography, dates and assistance-program fields.
datasets.access: Use the protected API page and paginate with $skip for more than 1000 rows.
datasets.size: Manageable through API pages.
datasets.validation: Direct OpenFEMA API query returned application/json.
datasets.caveats: Historical records can contain human-entry errors and partial fields.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: FHWA National Bridge Inventory 2025
datasets.description: U.S. bridge inventory records in comma-delimited format, covering condition, age, structure and route attributes.
datasets.access: Use the protected all-states delimited ZIP and read FHWA field documentation for column meanings.
datasets.size: About 59MB.
datasets.license: U.S. DOT/FHWA public data; note Title 23 U.S.C. section 409 disclaimer.
datasets.validation: Direct FHWA ZIP returned application/x-zip-compressed with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Records may be corrected during the year; disclosure and statutory caveats apply.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: London Fire Brigade Animal Rescues
datasets.description: Niche London Fire Brigade records for animal rescue incidents.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with Animal rescue incidents XLSX (XLSX).
datasets.size: Very manageable; around a few MB.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current.
datasets.caveats: Notional cost field; no routine animal injury/death data.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: London Fire Brigade Incident Records
datasets.description: Details of London Fire Brigade incidents since 2009, including incident type, property type and response context.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with LFB incidents 2024 onwards XLSX (XLSX).
datasets.size: Large but manageable; individual chunks can be tens to hundreds of MB.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current corrected URL.
datasets.caveats: Station-ground definitions changed after 2014 closures; later files can be large.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: NHTSA FARS National Fatal Crash Data
datasets.description: U.S. fatal crash census data with accident, vehicle and person tables in a direct CSV ZIP.
datasets.access: Use the protected 2023 National CSV ZIP and read the codebooks from NHTSA for table definitions.
datasets.size: About 34MB.
datasets.license: U.S. federal public data; cite NHTSA/FARS.
datasets.validation: Direct NHTSA ZIP returned application/x-zip-compressed with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Fatal crashes only; not comparable to all crash or injury datasets without context.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: NYC Motor Vehicle Collisions - Crashes
datasets.description: Police-reported New York City crash records with dates, locations, contributing factors and injury/fatality counts.
datasets.access: Use the protected Socrata CSV query for a bounded 2025 extract; adjust date filters for other windows.
datasets.size: Manageable with filters and row limit; full history is larger.
datasets.validation: Direct Socrata CSV query returned text/csv.
datasets.caveats: Police-report thresholds, missing locations and reporting completeness affect interpretation.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: Police.uk Street-Level Crime Data
datasets.description: Monthly street-level crime, outcome and stop/search data by force and small area.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with Latest police archive ZIP (ZIP of CSV).
datasets.size: Monthly/force batches manageable; full history can become multi-GB.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current.
datasets.caveats: Street locations are anonymised/approximate; reporting lag and force differences matter.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: STATS19 Road Safety Open Data
datasets.description: GB collision, vehicle and casualty records for recorded personal-injury road accidents.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with Collision 2024 CSV (CSV).
datasets.size: Year files are easy; full 1979-2024 files approach or exceed 1GB by table.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current; latest final validated full year identified as 2024.
datasets.caveats: Relational data; public files exclude some sensitive/contributory-factor fields.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset
datasets.description: Geocoded organized-violence events with dates, actors, deaths and locations.
datasets.access: Use the protected GED CSV ZIP and retain codebook/context for sensitive interpretation.
datasets.size: About 29MB.
datasets.validation: Direct UCDP ZIP returned application/x-zip-compressed with expected content length.
datasets.caveats: Conflict data is sensitive and reporting-biased; avoid simplistic causal claims.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: Historic England National Heritage List for England
datasets.description: Spatial data for listed buildings, scheduled monuments, parks, gardens, battlefields, wrecks and World Heritage Sites.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with NHLE GeoJSON API sample (GeoJSON API).
datasets.size: National layers manageable with GIS.
datasets.validation: Reachable/current; listed-building layers noted as updated on 2026-05-08.
datasets.caveats: NHLE covers protected assets only; point and polygon layers answer different questions.
datasets.strict_validation: Kept after strict open-download validation: no login, no API key, direct standard-format download or unauthenticated endpoint.

datasets.title: HM Land Registry Price Paid Data
datasets.description: England and Wales property sale prices from 1995 onwards with monthly and yearly downloads.
datasets.access: Use the protected download links in this catalogue; start with 2026 yearly CSV (CSV).
datasets.size: Full CSV around 5.3GB; yearly CSVs roughly 115-230MB.

datasets.title: National Park Service Visitor Use Statistics
datasets.description: Annual and monthly visitor-use records by U.S. national park unit, useful for tourism rankings and long-run trends.
datasets.access: Use the protected main and state CSV files directly.
datasets.size: About 72MB for main data and 22MB for state data.
datasets.license: CC0 / public-domain style terms on source page.
datasets.validation: Direct NPS download URLs returned CSV-like files with expected sizes.
datasets.caveats: Park counts can be affected by closures, method changes and special events.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.

datasets.title: Old Bailey Online Data

datasets.caveats: Historical markup is complex; API and XML versions may differ after overhaul.

datasets.title: Social Security Baby Names
datasets.description: U.S. baby-name counts by year, sex and name, with national and state-level ZIP files.
datasets.access: Use the protected national or state ZIP and parse the simple comma-separated text files.

datasets.license: SSA public data; cite Social Security Administration.
datasets.validation: Direct SSA ZIPs returned application/zip with expected content lengths.
datasets.caveats: Names with fewer than five occurrences are suppressed; hyphens/spaces are removed.
datasets.strict_validation: Added after May 2026 direct-route validation: no login or API key; direct data link returned data or source endpoint was browser-verified. Large files were not fully downloaded.
